## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` clean
- [ ] `npm test` green
- [ ] `npm run coverage` no regression
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] NatSpec added for any new external/public function
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` / `SECURITY.md` updated if invariants or roles change
